_comment: FORCE LEVER for urgent updates. To push a fix to all Windows apps NOW: publish the new version, then set forceMinVersion to that version number (e.g. 2.1.5). Every running Windows app below it downloads it and auto-restarts into the latest within ~10-15 minutes. Leave at 0.0.0 for normal (gentle, install-on-next-restart) updates. macOS cannot be force-updated (manual install). See docs/UPDATING.md.
